response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as Tokino Sora from the video and her song "Wonderland". 2. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics in Japanese and English to ensure accuracy. 3. Mapped the video as a single continuous performance scene.
response.global_summary: A live performance by Tokino Sora of her original song "Wonderland".

scenes.description: Tokino Sora performs her song "Wonderland" on a concert stage with interactive visual effects.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I want to spend every day like a miracle with you
It's a wonderland together
I want to go see your smile with the dream I longed for
Just hug my favorite feelings without change
I want to feel the magical glitter forever
Now fantastic miracle romantic
Show hope and run through tomorrow
Yes, dreaming, collecting illuminations
Let's find the dream door
The world will shine more tomorrow
It's a wonderland

Midnight, the bell rings, I'll run in a nice carriage princess
I'm going to see you from the night sky, with a wish, shooting star
Two dancing swaying silhouettes
Don't wake up, dream world, I want to jump more jump
Now fantastic miracle romantic
Surprised, laughing, crying, listening
Everything if you fascinate, entertainment
Find your dream ticket
The world will shine more tomorrow
It's a wonderland

Imagine that you should be able to fly in the sky. This world where you are
Overflowing with love

Yes, dreaming, collecting illuminations
